description: A permitting manager needs to model the noise propagation from a proposed wind farm to ensure it complies with local ordinances.

nodes.task_description: Gather the sound power level specifications for the selected wind turbine model.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the manufacturer's noise data.

nodes.task_description: Identify the locations of the nearest residences and the local noise level limits (e.g., 45 dBA at night).

expected_outcome.value: Agent maps nearby homes and retrieves the local noise ordinance.

nodes.task_description: Run a noise propagation model to predict the sound level at each residence.

expected_outcome.value: Model shows that all but one residence will be below the noise limit.

nodes.task_description: Suggest mitigation options, such as relocating a turbine or offering to purchase a noise easement from the affected homeowner.
